items.text: Inner West Podiatry v2 pages for each newsletter archive issue.
Replace mailto forms with webhook + sheet capture flow.
Project status chips (live, beta, experimental) on Projects home.
Auto-generate changelog items from git commits.
Calendar glow-up with category colors and filters.
Blog index fully rendered from JSON with search + tags.
Theme toggle with Light, Dark, and Diego Neon modes.
Reusable media components with credits and lazy loading.
